perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair wearing a brown off-the-shoulder top stands in a Costco warehouse, pointing at a refrigerated display filled with strawberry and blueberry tarts. (2) She picks up a large tart in a transparent plastic container and smiles at the camera while variety-show style text overlays appear. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen/living room where two women (the first woman and another in a grey hat) sit behind a table. (4) A close-up shot follows, showing a slice of the tart on a blue plate, highlighting a thick white cheesecake layer topped with red strawberry glaze and whole berries. (5) The two women taste the tart, making exaggerated facial expressions of enjoyment and giving double thumbs-up gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music plays throughout. A young woman's voice is heard speaking in an excited, high-pitched tone, accompanied by the muffled ambient hum of a warehouse store. (2) A male narrator's voice joins, delivering a high-energy commentary with a professional yet enthusiastic tone. (3) Frequent sound effects (SFX) like 'pops', 'dings', and 'sparkle' sounds occur whenever text or stickers appear on the screen. (4) The ambient noise shifts from a busy store to a quiet indoor environment as the scene transitions to the home setting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) COSTCO WHOLESALE logo (Decorative: Brand identification). (2) "不輸飯店口感" (Decorative: Hook - Not inferior to hotel taste). (3) "草莓藍莓乳酪塔 10月黑馬" (Decorative: Product Title - Strawberry Blueberry Cheese Tart, October Dark Horse). (4) "$549" (Functional: Price). (5) "簡直太便宜" (Decorative: Conclusion - Simply too cheap) with animated sparkles.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping discovery -> Product close-up -> Home tasting and review -> Final verdict

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, blurred shoppers in the Costco background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one has long dark hair in a brown off-the-shoulder top, the other wears a silver/grey bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First half is inside a Costco warehouse with shelves of products and shoppers; second half is a home kitchen with a counter, plates, and household items.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy product review and recommendation for a specific seasonal dessert at Costco. It combines a 'treasure hunt' shopping experience with a detailed home taste-test to validate the product's value and quality to the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of Costco logo and direct praise for the product's price and taste.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style captions and high-energy dual-vocal narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes fast-paced editing and beat-synced visuals to maintain high viewer retention, typical of short-form food influencers.
